model_fit_rule: PtO Ridge and SPO+ are fit on train split only; valid is used for diagnostics.

checks.rule: t month-end features only use data observed at or before sample date
checks.evidence: All features use prices, returns, and volume observed at or before sample date.

checks.rule: t month-end features predict t+1 month / forward 21-trading-day returns
checks.evidence: Forward 21-trading-day return and cross-sectional relative labels.

checks.rule: portfolio return uses the next-period realized return already stored as future_return_21d
StandardScaler is fit on train split only, then transforms validation and test
checks.evidence: StandardScaler is fit on train split only; valid and test are transformed.

checks.rule: split dates keep test data after training/validation period
